heading: Authority to prescribe regulations
label: 5328 Authority to prescribe regulations
text: The Committee on House Oversight of the House of Representatives shall have authority to prescribe regulations for the carrying out of sections 5327 to 5329 of this title.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 92b–2 of this titleSection is based on section 2 of House Resolution 804, Ninety-sixth Congress, , as enacted into permanent law by H.R. 4120, as reported , which was enacted into permanent law by .Oct. 2, 1980July 9, 1981section 101(c) of Pub. L. 97–51
Amendments1996— substituted “House Oversight of the House of Representatives” for “House Administration”.Pub. L. 104–186

Change of NameCommittee on House Oversight of House of Representatives changed to Committee on House Administration of House of Representatives by House Resolution No. 5, One Hundred Sixth Congress, .Jan. 6, 1999
